headline: Bellwether Stock Surges Above Key Level. Trump Is Why.
summary: Deere and heavy machinery stocks continued to rally on Wednesday after the White House announced lower metal tariffs on imported farm and industrial machinery.  Deere stock popped further above a key technical level.  In a proclamation on Monday, President Donald Trump moved to reduce tariffs on agricultural equipment, like combines and harvesters, from 25% to 15%.
